strategy: Belloq punishes stalling: any round he takes zero damage, he interrupt-casts Ra for ~1,460-1,540 the next round. Deal at least some damage every round.
Attack with Myth, Life, or Death; he takes +25% from those and resists Balance 80%.
Keep a wand hit or small spell to chip him on setup rounds so the Ra never triggers.
Blade up across a couple of rounds while chipping, then finish with one boosted hit.
If you would rather burst, just shield for Ra (~1,500) and hit hard next round.
cheatNotes: If he takes no damage in a round he hits back with Ra (~1,500). Throw a wand or small chip every round so this never fires, or shield up for it.
